Symptoms: High temperature alarm on stave cooling loop 4
Root_Cause: Refractory wear exposed copper stave to severe thermal shock
Corrective_Action: Injected carbon grout and bypassed compromised cooling channel until outage
Lessons_Learned: Increase frequency of thermal shell imaging from monthly to bi-weekly

Symptoms: Sudden drop in Tuyere 12 cooling water flow
Root_Cause: Burn-through on Tuyere 12 copper tip due to hot metal contact
Corrective_Action: Isolated water circuit and replaced Tuyere 12 under reduced wind
Lessons_Learned: Install automated acoustic leak detection on primary tuyere cooling lines

Symptoms: Mud gun failed to slew into position during tapping
Root_Cause: Internal leak in the mud gun hydraulic slew cylinder
Corrective_Action: Replaced hydraulic cylinder and bled the system
Lessons_Learned: Add cylinder seal pressure-drop tests to the monthly PM schedule

Symptoms: Top gas analyzer showing erratic CO/CO2 readings
Root_Cause: Condensation buildup in the sampling line leading to the sensor
Corrective_Action: Purged lines with nitrogen and replaced the moisture trap
Lessons_Learned: Install heated trace lines on all top gas analyzer sampling tubes

Symptoms: Skip car drive motor tripped on overcurrent
Root_Cause: Winch drum brake failed to fully release due to mechanical binding
Corrective_Action: Cleaned and lubricated brake linkage; reset motor overloads
Lessons_Learned: Implement visual checks of brake caliper release during skip car operation

Symptoms: Hot blast valve #2 failed to fully seat
Root_Cause: Refractory buildup on the valve seat
Corrective_Action: Cooled valve and manually chipped away slag/refractory buildup
Lessons_Learned: Adjust combustion air ratios in stoves to reduce refractory dusting

Symptoms: Bleeder valve opened prematurely during normal operation
Root_Cause: Fatigue failure of the valve counterweight linkage
Corrective_Action: Replaced linkage and re-calibrated opening pressure setpoints
Lessons_Learned: Upgrade bleeder linkages to high-tensile forged steel components

Symptoms: Slag granulation pump tripped on high vibration
Root_Cause: Excessive slag wool buildup on the pump impeller
Corrective_Action: Isolated pump and manually cleared impeller; balanced shaft
Lessons_Learned: Optimize granulation water pressure to prevent slag wool formation

Root_Cause: Moisture in the coal dust causing agglomeration in the feed pipe
Corrective_Action: Dismantled and pneumatically cleaned the blocked feed pipe section
Lessons_Learned: Improve moisture monitoring at the coal grinding mill exit

Symptoms: Cast house dedusting fan suction dropped by 30%
Root_Cause: Torn filter bags in the main baghouse compartment
Corrective_Action: Isolated compartment and replaced 45 torn filter bags
Lessons_Learned: Install differential pressure sensors on individual baghouse compartments

Root_Cause: Misalignment of the top deflector sheave
Corrective_Action: Replaced 200m of wire rope and laser-aligned the sheave
Lessons_Learned: Add sheave alignment checks to quarterly mechanical inspections

Root_Cause: Spalling on the secondary pinion gear teeth
Corrective_Action: Replaced pinion gear and performed full oil flush
Lessons_Learned: Perform oil debris analysis on tilt drives bi-monthly

Root_Cause: Failed limit switch caused over-travel and rope slack
Corrective_Action: Manually reversed winch; replaced limit switch and tensioned rope
Lessons_Learned: Implement dual-redundant limit switches for lance hoist upper limits

Symptoms: Water leak detected from the exhaust hood panel
Root_Cause: Thermal fatigue cracking in panel 4B
Corrective_Action: Welded patch over crack; scheduled full panel replacement
Lessons_Learned: Monitor hood cooling water return temperatures more strictly

Symptoms: Bottom stirring argon flow critically low
Root_Cause: Clogged porous plugs at the vessel bottom
Corrective_Action: Burned out clogs using oxygen lances during turnaround
Lessons_Learned: Adjust stirring gas flow rates during tapping to prevent metal ingress

Root_Cause: Pneumatic actuator diaphragm ruptured
Corrective_Action: Replaced pneumatic actuator and re-stroked the valve
Lessons_Learned: Replace pneumatic diaphragms preventatively every 2 years

Symptoms: Vessel lip ring deformed preventing tight hood seal
Root_Cause: Impact damage from excessive skull buildup removal
Corrective_Action: Cut out deformed section and welded new lip ring segment
Lessons_Learned: Use thermal lancing for skull removal instead of mechanical ramming

Symptoms: Slag door hydraulic cylinder leaking heavily
Root_Cause: Scored cylinder rod due to airborne dust contamination
Corrective_Action: Replaced cylinder and installed a protective rod boot
Lessons_Learned: Mandate protective boots on all hydraulics within 10m of the converter

Root_Cause: Loss of grease supply due to a blocked auto-lube line
Corrective_Action: Cleared auto-lube line and manually packed bearing
Lessons_Learned: Install flow sensors on critical auto-lube grease lines

Root_Cause: Debris on the tracks and worn wheel flanges
Corrective_Action: Rerailed car using jacks; replaced two worn wheels
Lessons_Learned: Schedule daily track sweeping and monthly wheel profile checks

Root_Cause: Sensor sheath melting due to direct flame impingement
Corrective_Action: Relocated sensor 2 meters downstream and upgraded sheath material
Lessons_Learned: Review fluid dynamics of off-gas system before placing new sensors

Root_Cause: Moisture caused ferrosilicon fines to cake and harden
Corrective_Action: Chipped out caked alloy and installed electric heaters on chute walls
Lessons_Learned: Keep alloy storage bins completely dry and enclosed

Symptoms: Mould oscillator motion irregular and jerky
Root_Cause: Fatigue failure of the drive-side leaf spring
Corrective_Action: Replaced leaf spring assembly and re-calibrated stroke
Lessons_Learned: Mandatory leaf spring replacement at 2.5 million oscillation cycles

Symptoms: Liquid steel breakout below the mould
Root_Cause: Sudden fluctuation in mould level causing thin shell formation
Corrective_Action: Aborted cast; cleared breakout steel and replaced mould copper
Lessons_Learned: Tune mould level control PID loop and inspect eddy current sensors

Root_Cause: Cooling water penetrated the bearing housing
Corrective_Action: Cut out seized roll; replaced bearing and upgraded housing seals
Lessons_Learned: Use double-lip labyrinth seals on all segment rolls

Root_Cause: Clogged spray nozzles in Zone 2
Corrective_Action: Flushed header and replaced 12 clogged nozzles
Lessons_Learned: Install finer mesh auto-backwash filters on secondary cooling water intake

Root_Cause: Brake failed to release due to burned contactor
Corrective_Action: Replaced electrical contactor and manually lowered dummy bar
Lessons_Learned: Scan electrical cabinets with thermal camera weekly to catch hot spots

Symptoms: Torch cutter failed to clamp slab
Root_Cause: Hydraulic pressure loss in the clamping circuit
Corrective_Action: Replaced blown hydraulic hose on the cutting car
Lessons_Learned: Use fire-resistant hydraulic hoses near the torch cutting zone

Root_Cause: Spilled steel slag welded the car wheel to the rail
Corrective_Action: Lanced away the slag and repaired the rail profile
Lessons_Learned: Install steel deflector shields over tundish car rails

Root_Cause: Lack of lubrication leading to metal-to-metal contact
Corrective_Action: Injected emergency extreme-pressure grease; scheduled bearing swap
Lessons_Learned: Automate grease injection for the turret bearing and monitor reservoir

Root_Cause: Insulation failure on coil phase B due to water ingress
Corrective_Action: Bypassed EMS for current cast; replaced coil during turnaround
Lessons_Learned: Pot all EMS coil connections with high-grade waterproof epoxy

Root_Cause: Insufficient hydraulic pinch pressure
Corrective_Action: Adjusted proportional valve and recalibrated load cells
Lessons_Learned: Verify withdrawal roll pinch pressure settings before every cast

Symptoms: Mould water return temperature too high
Root_Cause: Scale buildup in the mould copper cooling slots
Corrective_Action: Removed mould and chemically descaled the cooling slots
Lessons_Learned: Tightly control primary cooling water chemistry and pH

Symptoms: Roughing stand pinion gear catastrophic failure
Root_Cause: Severe misalignment and shock loading from cold slabs
Corrective_Action: Replaced pinion stand completely and realigned drive train
Lessons_Learned: Install automated temperature scanners to reject cold slabs before rougher

Symptoms: AGC (Auto Gauge Control) cylinder slow response
Root_Cause: Internal seal bypass in the servo-hydraulic cylinder
Corrective_Action: Replaced AGC cylinder and flushed servo valve block
Lessons_Learned: Implement step-response testing of AGC cylinders during weekly PMs

Root_Cause: Pneumatic actuator airline sheared
Corrective_Action: Spliced the pneumatic airline and secured it away from moving parts
Lessons_Learned: Reroute all pneumatic lines on looper tables through armored conduit

Root_Cause: Strip tail end cobble wedged in the wrapper gap
Corrective_Action: Manually cut out the cobble and reset the wrapper mechanism
Lessons_Learned: Adjust wrapper roll gap timing to match strip tail speed accurately

Root_Cause: Fatigue failure from torsional vibration
Corrective_Action: Replaced drive shaft and installed torque limiting coupling
Lessons_Learned: Perform torsional vibration analysis on all pinch roll drive trains

Root_Cause: Algae buildup blocking the upper header nozzles
Corrective_Action: Flushed headers with biocide and replaced nozzles
Lessons_Learned: Increase biocide dosing in the laminar cooling water circuit

Root_Cause: Blade clearance set incorrectly causing edge collision
Corrective_Action: Replaced shear blades and recalibrated gap clearance
Lessons_Learned: Use feeler gauges to verify shear blade clearance post-installation

Root_Cause: Scale ingress destroyed the roller bearing
Corrective_Action: Replaced roller and upgraded to a sealed ceramic bearing design
Lessons_Learned: Purge guide box bearings with compressed air to keep scale out

Root_Cause: Inadequate grease packing during roll shop prep
Corrective_Action: Swapped work rolls mid-campaign; repacked bearings properly
Lessons_Learned: Implement quality control checks in the roll shop for grease weight

Symptoms: Tension reel mandrel failed to expand
Root_Cause: Broken linkage inside the mandrel wedge mechanism
Corrective_Action: Swapped the mandrel cassette with a spare
Lessons_Learned: Perform ultrasonic testing of mandrel linkages every 6 months

Root_Cause: Scale buildup buried the pump suction bell
Corrective_Action: Excavated scale using a clamshell crane and restored flow
Lessons_Learned: Automate the scale pit dredging schedule based on tonnage rolled

Symptoms: Main drive DC motor commutator flashing
Root_Cause: Carbon brush dust accumulation and low brush tension
Corrective_Action: Blew out dust; replaced worn carbon brushes and polished commutator
Lessons_Learned: Mandate monthly brush length and spring tension checks on DC drives

Root_Cause: Sheared pin in the mast lift rack-and-pinion drive
Corrective_Action: Replaced the shear pin and verified mast alignment
Lessons_Learned: Inspect mast guide rollers to prevent binding that shears the pin

Symptoms: Roof lift cylinder leaking hydraulic fluid
Root_Cause: Heat degradation of the cylinder chevron seals
Corrective_Action: Replaced seals with Viton high-temp equivalents
Lessons_Learned: Install radiant heat shields around roof lift cylinders

Symptoms: Porous plug failed to bubble argon
Root_Cause: Slag penetration froze over the plug surface
Corrective_Action: Used oxygen lance to open the plug and restored argon flow
Lessons_Learned: Maintain positive argon pressure through the plug during ladle transport

Root_Cause: Cooling water pump for the transformer heat exchanger tripped
Corrective_Action: Switched to standby pump and reset the alarm
Lessons_Learned: Interlock the transformer power with the cooling water flow switch

Symptoms: Wire feeder jammed feeding calcium wire
Root_Cause: Misalignment between the feed rollers and the guide tube
Corrective_Action: Realigned guide tube and cleared the jammed wire
Lessons_Learned: Use thicker guide tubes to prevent wire wandering

Root_Cause: Warped door frame due to excessive radiant heat
Corrective_Action: Cut out the warped section and welded a reinforced frame
Lessons_Learned: Implement water-cooled door frames for the Ladle Furnace

Root_Cause: Electrical arcing from the electrode punctured the panel
Corrective_Action: Swapped the roof assembly with a spare
Lessons_Learned: Adjust electrode regulation limits to prevent roof arcing

Root_Cause: Loose terminal connection burned out the secondary wire
Corrective_Action: Re-terminated the CT wiring and tested calibration
Lessons_Learned: Include electrical terminal tightening in the annual shutdown scope

Symptoms: Ladle transfer car wheel bearing collapsed
Root_Cause: Extreme load and radiant heat destroyed the bearing cage
Corrective_Action: Lifted car off rails; replaced wheel assembly
Lessons_Learned: Upgrade to high-temperature synthetic grease for transfer cars

Root_Cause: Dust buildup on the load cell mechanism
Corrective_Action: Cleaned the load cell and calibrated the weigh-feeder
Lessons_Learned: Enclose the load cells in pressurized dust-proof housings

Root_Cause: Contamination in the argon supply line
Corrective_Action: Replaced the flowmeter and installed an inline gas filter
Lessons_Learned: Blow down argon supply lines prior to connecting to the flow panel

Root_Cause: Dry running due to loss of suction head
Corrective_Action: Replaced mechanical seal and primed the pump properly
Lessons_Learned: Install low-suction pressure trip switches on all cooling pumps

Root_Cause: Axial overload caused by a worn impeller wear ring
Corrective_Action: Replaced bearing and installed new casing wear rings
Lessons_Learned: Monitor pump axial vibration as an early indicator of wear ring failure

Root_Cause: Suction valve was partially closed restricting flow
Corrective_Action: Fully opened suction valve and inspected impeller for pitting
Lessons_Learned: Lock-open all manual suction valves with a chain and padlock

Root_Cause: Pump and motor were severely misaligned after baseplate repair
Corrective_Action: Replaced polyurethane insert and performed laser alignment
Lessons_Learned: Mandate laser alignment documentation for any motor movement

Symptoms: Motor stator winding short to ground
Root_Cause: Moisture ingress in the motor terminal box
Corrective_Action: Replaced motor with a spare; sealed terminal box with RTV
Lessons_Learned: Use silica gel packets in terminal boxes in high-humidity areas

Root_Cause: Bent pump shaft due to sudden ingestion of a solid object
Corrective_Action: Replaced the entire rotating assembly
Lessons_Learned: Ensure suction strainers are fully intact and sized correctly

Root_Cause: Algae and plastic debris in the cooling tower basin
Corrective_Action: Cleaned strainer and initiated cooling tower basin dredging
Lessons_Learned: Improve cooling tower screening and water treatment protocols

Symptoms: Discharge check valve slammed shut (Water Hammer)
Root_Cause: Broken dampener spring inside the check valve
Corrective_Action: Replaced check valve internals
Lessons_Learned: Implement non-slam tilting disc check valves for large pumps

Root_Cause: Pipe strain due to improper pipe support installation
Corrective_Action: Welded casing crack and adjusted pipe hangers to relieve strain
Lessons_Learned: Conduct pipe strain checks before final torquing of pump flanges

Symptoms: Auto-start logic failed during pressure drop
Root_Cause: Faulty pressure transmitter sent a frozen signal to the PLC
Corrective_Action: Replaced pressure transmitter and tested auto-start sequence
Lessons_Learned: Program PLC to detect flatlined/frozen sensor signals

Root_Cause: Plastic fan became brittle from ambient heat and UV exposure
Corrective_Action: Replaced fan with a cast aluminum equivalent
Lessons_Learned: Standardize on metal cooling fans for all motors in hot plant zones

Root_Cause: Scale fouling inside the water tubes of the intercooler
Corrective_Action: Acid-washed the intercooler tube bundle
Lessons_Learned: Treat compressor cooling water to prevent calcium scale buildup

Root_Cause: Extreme dust load from nearby bulk material handling
Corrective_Action: Replaced filter elements and relocated the air intake stack
Lessons_Learned: Install pre-filters/cyclones on compressor intakes in dusty environments

Root_Cause: Valve plate fractured due to fatigue
Corrective_Action: Replaced discharge valve assembly
Lessons_Learned: Adhere strictly to the 8000-hour valve replacement schedule

Root_Cause: Sheared drive pin on the mechanical oil pump
Corrective_Action: Replaced drive pin and verified oil flow
Lessons_Learned: Inspect oil pump drive pins during major compressor overhauls

Root_Cause: Anti-surge valve failed to open due to a blown I/P transducer
Corrective_Action: Replaced transducer and re-tuned the anti-surge controller
Lessons_Learned: Test anti-surge valve operation manually every month

Root_Cause: Blocked cooling air passages in the motor casing
Corrective_Action: Blew out the motor casing with compressed air
Lessons_Learned: Include motor casing cleaning in the monthly PM route

Root_Cause: Galled piston in the unloader pneumatic cylinder
Corrective_Action: Honed the cylinder and replaced the unloader piston rings
Lessons_Learned: Lubricate unloader air supply with inline pneumatic oilers

Root_Cause: Condensate carryover into the plant air system
Corrective_Action: Replaced the float trap with a timed electronic drain valve
Lessons_Learned: Standardize electronic auto-drains on all compressor moisture separators

Root_Cause: Carbon buildup on the discharge valves restricting flow
Corrective_Action: Removed valves and cleaned carbon deposits
Lessons_Learned: Switch to a synthetic compressor oil with higher thermal stability

Root_Cause: Silencer internals corroded from acidic condensate
Corrective_Action: Replaced silencer with a stainless steel unit
Lessons_Learned: Use corrosion-resistant materials for all blowoff and drain piping

Symptoms: High vibration on the bull gear
Root_Cause: Worn journal bearing causing excessive clearance
Corrective_Action: Replaced bull gear journal bearing and checked gear mesh
Lessons_Learned: Conduct routine vibration spectrum analysis to catch journal wear early

Root_Cause: Uneven dust buildup on the fan impeller blades
Corrective_Action: Manually cleaned the impeller and performed dynamic balancing
Lessons_Learned: Repair the automated compressed air pulse-cleaning system

Root_Cause: Over-tensioned V-belts created excessive radial load
Corrective_Action: Replaced bearing and tensioned belts to manufacturer spec
Lessons_Learned: Use sonic belt tension meters instead of relying on thumb pressure

Root_Cause: Misaligned pulleys caused edge wear on the belts
Corrective_Action: Laser aligned pulleys and installed a new matched set of belts
Lessons_Learned: Always use a matched set of V-belts from the same manufacturing batch

Symptoms: Inlet damper actuator failed to move
Root_Cause: Stripped gears in the electric damper actuator
Corrective_Action: Replaced actuator and checked damper blades for binding
Lessons_Learned: Lubricate damper blade linkages with high-temp graphite spray

Symptoms: Vibration transmitted to the concrete foundation
Root_Cause: Broken spring in the vibration isolation mount
Corrective_Action: Replaced all four vibration isolators under the fan base
Lessons_Learned: Replace vibration isolators in complete sets to maintain level

Root_Cause: Acidic off-gas condensation deteriorated the fabric
Corrective_Action: Replaced expansion joint with a PTFE-lined composite material
Lessons_Learned: Ensure off-gas temperature remains above the acid dew point

Root_Cause: Clogged inline oil filter
Corrective_Action: Switched to the duplex filter side and replaced the dirty element
Lessons_Learned: Install differential pressure gauges on all forced-lube oil filters

Root_Cause: Soft starter SCR module shorted out
Corrective_Action: Bypassed soft starter (direct-on-line start) temporarily; ordered new SCR
Lessons_Learned: Keep spare SCR modules in the climate-controlled electrical store

Symptoms: Toxic gas leak from fan shaft seal
Root_Cause: Carbon ring seal wore out due to shaft runout
Corrective_Action: Realigned the fan shaft and replaced the carbon ring seal
Lessons_Learned: Monitor shaft runout during balancing to prevent premature seal wear

Root_Cause: Loose nut allowed the fan to bounce and shear the bolt
Corrective_Action: Drilled out old bolt; installed new epoxy anchor bolt
Lessons_Learned: Check baseplate bolt torque quarterly on all heavy rotating equipment

Root_Cause: Sight glass cracked from accidental impact
Corrective_Action: Drained oil; replaced sight glass and refilled housing
Lessons_Learned: Install metal guards over glass components on field equipment

Symptoms: Main hoist wire rope severely frayed
Root_Cause: Rope jumped the sheave groove and rubbed against the housing
Corrective_Action: Replaced wire rope and installed rope guard pins on the sheave
Lessons_Learned: Ensure rope tension is maintained when lowering the hook to the floor

Symptoms: Bridge drive failed to stop accurately
Root_Cause: Brake pads worn down to the rivets
Corrective_Action: Replaced brake pads and adjusted the brake air gap
Lessons_Learned: Implement a caliper measurement PM for crane brake pads

Root_Cause: A broken trolley wheel caused the cable to drag and catch
Corrective_Action: Spliced the power cable and replaced the festoon trolley
Lessons_Learned: Inspect festoon track and trolleys during every crane PM

Symptoms: Upper limit switch failed causing two-blocking
Root_Cause: Moisture corroded the limit switch contacts
Corrective_Action: Replaced limit switch and installed a secondary weighted limit
Lessons_Learned: Require daily operator functional testing of all hoist limit switches

Root_Cause: Crane bridge was skewed out of square causing side-loading
Corrective_Action: Replaced wheel assembly and squared the crane bridge
Lessons_Learned: Monitor crane wheel flange wear as an indicator of bridge skew

Root_Cause: Radiant heat from ladles dried out the bearing grease
Corrective_Action: Replaced thrust bearing and applied high-temp aluminum complex grease
Lessons_Learned: Equip ladle cranes with heat-shielded hook blocks

Root_Cause: Cable interference from the VFD motor wires
Corrective_Action: Rerouted the load cell signal cable through shielded conduit
Lessons_Learned: Always separate low-voltage signal cables from high-voltage power cables

Root_Cause: Compressor condenser coils blocked with steel plant dust
Corrective_Action: Cleaned coils and restored AC operation
Lessons_Learned: Increase cabin AC filter replacement frequency to bi-weekly

Root_Cause: Operator excessively plugged (rapid reversed) the motor
Corrective_Action: Replaced motor and added anti-plugging logic to the VFD
Lessons_Learned: Train operators on proper crane control and utilize VFD deceleration ramps

Root_Cause: Worn potentiometers in the master controller
Corrective_Action: Replaced the master controller joystick assembly
Lessons_Learned: Keep spare pre-calibrated joysticks in the electrical workshop

Root_Cause: Arcing caused by pitted silver contacts
Corrective_Action: Forced a power disconnect; replaced the contactor
Lessons_Learned: Inspect critical hoist contactors for pitting during monthly PMs
